name: opencode-flashback
description: Persistent AI memory plugin for OpenCode — free, local, open-source

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build src/web/app.ts --outdir dist/web --target browser --minify && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --outDir dist && cp src/web/index.html src/web/styles.css src/web/favicon.ico dist/web/ && cp -r src/web/vendor dist/web/
scripts.test: for f in src/__tests__/*.test.ts; do bun test "$f" || exit 1; done
scripts.test:coverage: for f in src/__tests__/*.test.ts; do bun test --coverage --coverage-reporter=lcov --coverage-reporter=text "$f" || exit 1; done
